pi_items.source: Task metadata - synthetic test value for Electrical Calculations app
Task metadata - synthetic test value for Electrical Calculations app
Verified via official conversion formula (lux = lumens / area in square meters): 800 / 10 = 80. Formula confirmed at https://www.rapidtables.com/calc/light/how-lumen-to-lux.html

Official lighting calculation standard (lx = lm / m²). Confirmed by RapidTables (https://www.rapidtables.com/calc/light/how-lumen-to-lux.html) and Suprabeam (https://suprabeam.com/technology/lumen-to-lux/)

privileged_info_summary: This is a synthetic test task for the Electrical Calculations Android app (com.hsn.electricalcalculations). The task requires converting 800 lumens to lux over an area of 10 square meters. The expected result is 80 lux, which is mathematically correct per the standard conversion formula (lux = lumens / area in m²). The input values (800 lumens, 10 m²) are reasonable test values and the calculation is accurate.
